MODULE: cosmos.os_integration.bridge
FILE: cosmos/os_integration/bridge.py (102 lines)
CATEGORY: os_integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Agentic OS Integration.

"The computer is no longer a tool. It is an extension of the Swarm."

This module binds the Agent Swarm to the Operating System, allowing it to:
1. "See" not just the terminal, but the System Context (Active Window, Clipboard, Resources).
2. "Touch" the OS (File Syste

CLASSES:
- SystemContext: Captures the holistic state of the machine.
  Methods: def get_snapshot(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- OSBridge: Feeds OS events into the Nexus and executes OS-level actions.
  Methods: async def start_monitoring(self, interval: float=5.0)
  Methods: async def stop_monitoring(self)
  Methods: async def execute_action(self, action: str, params: Dict[str, Any])
